stemHtml: During a low level VFR flight at 600 ft AGL, which one of the following challenges may be faced by the pilot?

options.a: It might NOT be easy to recognise visual waypoints, so he/she could fly past them.
options.b: Open areas are much easier to identify than built-up areas.
options.c: Terrain contours are more difficult to spot compared to when flying at a high altitude.
options.d: Vertical features disappear in the surrounding environment and are difficult to spot.
